title: Kejsarn av Portugallien
actors: Victor Sjöström, Gunn Wållgren, Karl-Arne Holmsten
plot: Poor farmer Jan is getting very old when he becomes the father of a daughter, Klara Gulla. First he sees the child as a burden, but when he holds the newborn in his arms, he is overjoyed. He does everything in his power for her du...
